payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_57c83ef3c4fb4f6988f3d9c8', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='write_file', arguments='{"content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3\\n\\"\\"\\"Main script that integrates generator, analyzer, and calculator modules.\\"\\"\\"\\n\\nimport generator\\nimport analyzer\\nimport calculator\\n\\nprint(\\"=\\" * 50)\\nprint(\\"STEP 1: Generate Sales CSV\\")\\nprint(\\"=\\" * 50)\\ndata = generator.generate_sales_data()\\ngenerator.save_to_csv(data, \'sales_data.csv\')\\nprint(f\\"Generated sales data -> sales_data.csv\\")\\n\\nprint(\\"\\\\n\\" + \\"=\\" * 50)\\nprint(\\"STEP 2: Analyze Total Revenue\\")\\nprint(\\"=\\" * 50)\\ntotal_revenue = analyzer.calculate_total_revenue(\'sales_data.csv\')\\nprint(f\\"Total Revenue: ${total_revenue:.2f}\\")\\n\\nprint(\\"\\\\n\\" + \\"=\\" * 50)\\nprint(\\"STEP 3: Calculator Test\\")\\nprint(\\"=\\" * 50)\\nexpression = \\"10 + 5\\"\\nresult = calculator.calculate(expression)\\nprint(f\\"{expression} = {result}\\")", "filename": "main.py"}'), TYPE='function')]
